channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: 2.5D roguelite fighting game hybrid Shot One Fighters announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Build your own fighter with each run.

Red Moon Workshop has announced 2.5D roguelite fighting game hybrid Shot One Fighters for PC (Steam). A Kickstarter campaign is also planned.

Here is an overview of the game, via Red Moon Workshop:

About

Shot One Fighters is a single-player 2.5D roguelite fighting game hybrid! Meet a cast of colorful characters, design your perfect moveset, acquire powerful artifacts, and face down ass-kicking bosses in this innovative new game by industry veteran developers and artists.

Developed in collaboration with fighting game community legends Justin Wong and JMCrofts, Shot One Fighters blends the complexity of competitive fighting games with an addictive, run-based, single-player roguelite formula to create a wholly unique new fighting game experience. Every move you earn is one you perform, from combos and counters to gap closers and more. Grab powerful artifacts that change the rules against a galaxy of challengers, ensuring no two runs are alike.

Key Features

  • An Intergalactic Journey – Embark on an epic, highly replayable, fully voice-acted, cinematic, intergalactic journey that stretches beyond the bounds of space and time!
  • Build Your Hero, Fight Your Way – Customize your hero’s moves with over 100 options to discover and unlock across three characters. Build your hero the way you like with easy-to-pick-up, streamlined controls for fighting game masters or first-time brawlers alike.
  • A Mech to Call Home – Slowly rebuild and populate a massive mech hub that you call home where much of the story will unfold!
  • Roguelite Replayability – Discover over 100 artifacts, from the powerful to the bizarre, to spice up your runs, and encounter over 60 unique events and colorful NPCs throughout your journey, each with their own story to tell and challenges to offer.

Watch a new trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/2-5d-roguelite-fighting-game-hybrid-shot-one-fighters-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Diorama Break Kickstarter campaign launched – Japanese-inspired strategy RPG where you talk to the hero
item.content:encoded:
Studio Massimo Gauthier, headed by the lead programmer of ANTONBLAST, has launched a Kickstarter campaign for Diorama Break, a Japanese-inspired strategy RPG where the player can talk to the hero, the studio announced. It is seeking $95,000 CAD in funding, with plans for release on PC, Mac, and Linux via Steam, as well as major PlayStation, Xbox, and Nintendo consoles. A demo is available now for PC via Steam and itch.io.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

The special tactics JRPG that lets you talk directly to the Hero.

Marshal your wits and fight your way through turn-based battles and awkward conversations alike. Choose your words and actions with care. Or don’t. See what happens…

At the onset, you (yes, you) will be connected to a hero with his own plans, hopes, and fears, in a world that has raised him for this role. Question him, advise him, and guide him on his way. Your treatment of him will shape how events unfold.

Explore a vibrant world!

Branching dialogue with interjections!

An Unorthodox Tactical Battle System

  • Turns are split into six substeps, actions have varying substep durations and areas of effect. Slower actions might hit harder, while faster actions can be easier to land.
  • Both Player and Enemy units queue multiple actions ahead of time, then execute them concurrently.
  • Time your actions and movements carefully to hit your opponents before they hit you.
  • Inspired by fighting game concepts such as footsies, frame data, and attack interruption.

Other Features

  • A varied soundtrack (with genre inspirations including jazz fusion, electronic, and folk music) which reacts dynamically to gameplay.
  • A narrative with layers.
  • Built on top of a custom 2D game engine.

Watch a trailer below.

Kickstarter Campaign Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/diorama-break-kickstarter-campaign-launched-japanese-inspired-strategy-rpg-where-you-talk-to-the-hero
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
